PROP-baseauction-inv-019.text: getAssetOutAmount view must return 0 for invalid auctions instead of reverting.
PROP-baseauction-inv-019.assertion: forall getAssetOutAmount(view): auctionStart==0 OR expired => return 0 (no revert)

locations.note: view function; returns 0 early when auctionStart==0 or expired per natspec at line 744
